---
title: "Figure 2 (final) — 5-algo recovery on two axes + full IR correlation corner"
author: "Luciano Moffatt"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

<!--
PUBLICATION figure 2, the DECIDED composition (mix of 2A and 2B):

  PART A : the 5-algorithm small-multiple, for TWO parameter pairs (stacked rows)
             row 1 : (log10 k_on, log10 k_off)        kinetic axis
             row 2 : (log10 N_ch, log10 i_unit)       amplitude axis (N*i ridge)
           Shows the failures: for NR/MNR/R/MR the empirical mean drifts off truth
           (bias) and the naive Fisher ellipse mis-sizes the cloud (mis-calibration).

  PART B : the FULL correlation corner of the four informative parameters
             (on, off, unitary_current, Num_ch_mean) for MacroIR ALONE.
           Shows the success in full: in every parameter pair the three ellipses
           (empirical / Fisher / corrected) coincide (second-moment calibration) AND
           the three centre markers (truth / empirical mean / predicted truth+DIB)
           coincide on the truth (first-moment / unbiasedness). MR corner dropped.

Anchoring/scaling identical to figure_2_pub.Rmd: model covariances at theta_pool
(*_battery_pool), cov_scale = 1/REP_GROUP. group_size = 10, noise = 0.1.
-->

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
library(tidyverse)
library(patchwork)
```

```{r params}
DATA_DIR  <- "../data/433ed13"
REP_NCH      <- 100
REP_NSIM     <- 10000
REP_NOISE    <- "0.1"
REP_GROUP    <- 10
REP_INTERVAL <- 0.1

ALGOS    <- c("macro_NR","macro_NMR","macro_R","macro_MR","macro_IR")
ALGO_LAB <- c(macro_NR="NR", macro_NMR="MNR", macro_R="R", macro_MR="MR", macro_IR="IR")

PARAM_IDX <- c(on = 0, off = 1, unitary_current = 2, Num_ch_mean = 5)
# plotmath-parseable labels (rendered as proper subscripted math on axes and strips)
PARAM_LAB <- c(on = "log[10]~k[on]", off = "log[10]~k[off]",
               unitary_current = "log[10]~i", Num_ch_mean = "log[10]~N[ch]")
ORD <- c("on","off","unitary_current","Num_ch_mean")
TRUTH <- c(on = log10(10), off = log10(100),
           unitary_current = log10(1), Num_ch_mean = log10(REP_NCH))

cov_scale <- 1 / REP_GROUP
near_int  <- function(x) abs(x - REP_INTERVAL) < 1e-9
```

```{r read}
read_skip1 <- function(path) read.csv(path, skip = 1, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
base <- file.path(DATA_DIR,
  sprintf("figure_3_nch_%d_nsim_%d_%s_noise_%s", REP_NCH, REP_NSIM, ALGOS, REP_NOISE))

cloud   <- map_dfr(paste0(base, "_mle_cloud_runs.csv"), read_skip1)
battery <- map_dfr(paste0(base, "_battery_pool.csv"),   read_skip1) %>%
  mutate(component = str_replace(component_path, "^Probit_statistics_", ""))
bsim    <- map_dfr(paste0(base, "_battery_sim.csv"),    read_skip1) %>%
  mutate(component = str_replace(component_path, "^Probit_statistics_", ""),
         algo = factor(ALGO_LAB[algorithm], levels = unname(ALGO_LAB)))

pts <- cloud %>%
  filter(component_path == "Model_Parameters_Hat", statistic == "value",
         Num_ch == REP_NCH, group_size == REP_GROUP, near_int(interval_in_tau),
         param_name %in% names(PARAM_IDX)) %>%
  select(algorithm, sample_index, param_name, value) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = param_name, values_from = value) %>%
  mutate(algo = factor(ALGO_LAB[algorithm], levels = unname(ALGO_LAB)))
```

```{r helpers}
# breaks ANCHORED on the centre (the expected value, a round 0/1/2) with a 1-2-5 nice
# step: the round value always gets a tick AND there are enough ticks (3-5) to read the scale.
centered_break_vec <- function(center, half) {
  if (!is.finite(half) || half <= 0) return(center)
  # 3 ticks (centre and one each side). Pick the LARGEST "nice" step (1-2-4-5 ladder) that still
  # fits inside the half-width, so the two outer ticks sit as close to the panel edge as possible
  # without being clipped. The old 0.6*half heuristic undershot wide panels (the log10 N_ch axis
  # ended at +/-0.46 but the outer ticks landed at +/-0.2, leaving the ends bare -> "missing 1.6 /
  # 2.4"). Including 4*mag lets that axis snap to a 0.4 step -> ticks 1.6 / 2.0 / 2.4.
  mag  <- 10^floor(log10(half))
  cand <- c(1, 2, 4, 5) * mag; cand <- c(cand, cand * 10)
  step <- max(cand[cand <= half])
  # SNAP the centre onto the tick grid so the middle tick is a ROUND value, even when `center` is a
  # data mean(lims) pulled off the round truth by asymmetric outliers (that gave ticks like 2.000974).
  center <- round(center / step) * step
  round(center + step * (-1:1), 6)   # 3 ROUND ticks centred on the (snapped) expected value
}
# free-scale facets (corner): each panel is symmetric about its truth, so centre = mean(lims)
sym_breaks_fn <- function(lims) centered_break_vec(mean(lims), (max(lims) - min(lims)) / 2)

ellipse_path <- function(cx, cy, S, level = 0.95, npoints = 200) {
  if (is.null(S) || any(!is.finite(S))) return(NULL)
  ev <- eigen(S, symmetric = TRUE)
  if (any(ev$values <= 0)) return(NULL)
  r  <- sqrt(qchisq(level, df = 2))
  th <- seq(0, 2 * pi, length.out = npoints)
  Tm <- ev$vectors %*% diag(sqrt(ev$values)) %*% t(ev$vectors)
  P  <- Tm %*% (r * rbind(cos(th), sin(th)))
  data.frame(x = cx + P[1, ], y = cy + P[2, ])
}

# ellipse "area" proxy = sqrt(det) (proportional to the 95% region area); ratios grade each ellipse
.area <- function(S) if (is.null(S) || any(!is.finite(S))) NA_real_ else
  { ev <- eigen(S, symmetric = TRUE)$values; if (any(ev <= 0)) NA_real_ else sqrt(prod(ev)) }
.fmt  <- function(r) ifelse(!is.finite(r), "", ifelse(r >= 10, sprintf("%.0f×", r), sprintf("%.1f×", r)))

battery_cov_pair <- function(comp, algo, ix, jx) {           # ix,jx = param indices
  df <- battery %>%
    filter(component == comp, statistic == "value", probit == "mean",
           algorithm == algo, Num_ch == REP_NCH, near_int(interval_in_tau),
           param_index %in% c(ix, jx), param_col %in% c(ix, jx)) %>%
    select(param_index, param_col, value)
  m <- matrix(NA_real_, 2, 2); idx <- c(ix, jx)
  for (a in 1:2) for (b in 1:2) {
    v <- df$value[df$param_index == idx[a] & df$param_col == idx[b]]
    if (length(v) == 1 && is.finite(v)) m[a, b] <- v
  }
  m * cov_scale
}

# DIB vector (named param -> bias) for one algorithm, from battery_sim
dib_vector <- function(algo) {
  bsim %>%
    filter(component == "Likelihood_Distortion_Induced_Bias", statistic == "value",
           probit == "mean", algorithm == .env$algo, Num_ch == REP_NCH,
           near_int(interval_in_tau), param_name %in% ORD) %>%
    select(param_name, value) %>% deframe()
}

# --- PART A: 5-algorithm small-multiple for one parameter pair ---
centers_for_pair <- function(px, py, algos) {
  dib <- bsim %>%
    filter(component == "Likelihood_Distortion_Induced_Bias", statistic == "value",
           probit == "mean", Num_ch == REP_NCH, near_int(interval_in_tau),
           param_name %in% c(px, py)) %>%
    select(algo, param_name, value) %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = param_name, values_from = value)
  truth <- tibble(algo = factor(ALGO_LAB[algos], levels = unname(ALGO_LAB)),
                  x = unname(TRUTH[px]), y = unname(TRUTH[py]), kind = "truth")
  empc <- pts %>% filter(algorithm %in% algos) %>% group_by(algo) %>%
    summarise(x = mean(.data[[px]], na.rm = TRUE),
              y = mean(.data[[py]], na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
    mutate(kind = "empirical mean")
  predc <- dib %>%
    transmute(algo, x = unname(TRUTH[px]) + .data[[px]],
              y = unname(TRUTH[py]) + .data[[py]], kind = "predicted (truth + bias)")
  bind_rows(truth, empc, predc) %>%
    mutate(kind = factor(kind, levels = c("truth","empirical mean","predicted (truth + bias)")))
}

pair_plot <- function(px, py, algos = ALGOS) {
  pix <- PARAM_IDX[px]; piy <- PARAM_IDX[py]
  cl_all <- pts %>% filter(algorithm %in% algos) %>%
    transmute(algo, x = .data[[px]], y = .data[[py]]) %>% filter(is.finite(x), is.finite(y))
  ell <- list()
  for (a in algos) {
    cl <- pts %>% filter(algorithm == a) %>%
      transmute(x = .data[[px]], y = .data[[py]]) %>% filter(is.finite(x), is.finite(y))
    if (nrow(cl) < 3) next
    ctr  <- c(mean(cl$x), mean(cl$y))
    Ss <- list(empirical = cov(cbind(cl$x, cl$y)),
               Fisher    = battery_cov_pair("Likelihood_Fisher_Covariance", a, pix, piy),
               corrected = battery_cov_pair("Likelihood_Distortion_Corrected_Covariance", a, pix, piy))
    for (nm in names(Ss)) {
      e <- ellipse_path(ctr[1], ctr[2], Ss[[nm]])
      if (!is.null(e)) ell[[length(ell) + 1]] <- e %>% mutate(algo = ALGO_LAB[a], source = nm)
    }
  }
  ellipses <- bind_rows(ell) %>%
    mutate(algo = factor(algo, levels = unname(ALGO_LAB)),
           source = factor(source, levels = c("empirical","Fisher","corrected")))
  centers <- centers_for_pair(px, py, algos)
  tx <- unname(TRUTH[px]); ty <- unname(TRUTH[py])     # centre EVERY panel on the expected value
  hx <- 1.25 * max(abs(quantile(cl_all$x, c(.01, .99), na.rm = TRUE) - tx))
  hy <- 1.25 * max(abs(quantile(cl_all$y, c(.01, .99), na.rm = TRUE) - ty))
  xb <- centered_break_vec(tx, hx); yb <- centered_break_vec(ty, hy)

  # per-facet area-ratio labels: empirical/Fisher (the overconfidence factor) and empirical/corrected
  # (~1 when the sandwich recovers the true spread). Each number is coloured like the ellipse it grades.
  labs_df <- map_dfr(algos, function(a) {
    cl <- pts %>% filter(algorithm == a) %>%
      transmute(x = .data[[px]], y = .data[[py]]) %>% filter(is.finite(x), is.finite(y))
    if (nrow(cl) < 3) return(NULL)
    Aemp <- .area(cov(cbind(cl$x, cl$y)))
    # put the two ratio labels in whichever TOP corner is OFF the cloud's tilt (same rule as the
    # Part B corner): positive correlation -> cloud runs bottom-left..top-right, top-left empty
    # (hj=0); negative -> top-right empty (hj=1). The on/off and N_ch/i clouds are both negatively
    # correlated, so the old fixed top-left placement sat the numbers on top of the points.
    rho <- suppressWarnings(cor(cl$x, cl$y))
    hj  <- if (is.finite(rho) && rho < 0) 1 else 0
    tibble(algo  = factor(ALGO_LAB[a], levels = unname(ALGO_LAB)), hj = hj,
           lab_F = .fmt(Aemp / .area(battery_cov_pair("Likelihood_Fisher_Covariance", a, pix, piy))),
           lab_C = .fmt(Aemp / .area(battery_cov_pair("Likelihood_Distortion_Corrected_Covariance", a, pix, piy))))
  }) %>% mutate(x = tx + ifelse(hj == 1, hx, -hx) * 0.94, yF = ty + hy * 0.92, yC = ty + hy * 0.60)

  ggplot() +
    geom_point(data = cl_all, aes(x, y), colour = "grey55", size = .35, alpha = .18) +
    geom_path(data = ellipses, aes(x, y, colour = source, linetype = source, linewidth = source)) +
    geom_point(data = centers, aes(x, y, shape = kind), size = 2.4, stroke = .9,
               colour = "black", inherit.aes = FALSE) +
    geom_text(data = labs_df, aes(x, yF, label = lab_F, hjust = hj), colour = "#D55E00",
              size = 2.8, vjust = 1) +
    geom_text(data = labs_df, aes(x, yC, label = lab_C, hjust = hj), colour = "#0072B2",
              size = 2.8, vjust = 1) +
    facet_wrap(~ algo, nrow = 1) +
    coord_cartesian(xlim = tx + c(-hx, hx), ylim = ty + c(-hy, hy)) +
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = xb) + scale_y_continuous(breaks = yb) +
    scale_colour_manual(values = c(empirical = "grey45", Fisher = "#D55E00",
                                   corrected = "#0072B2"), name = NULL) +
    scale_linetype_manual(values = c(empirical = "solid", Fisher = "dashed",
                                     corrected = "dotted"), name = NULL) +
    scale_linewidth_manual(values = c(empirical = .55, Fisher = .75, corrected = 1.05), guide = "none") +
    scale_shape_manual(values = c("truth" = 3, "empirical mean" = 19,
                                  "predicted (truth + bias)" = 1), name = NULL) +
    labs(x = parse(text = unname(PARAM_LAB[px]))[[1]],
         y = parse(text = unname(PARAM_LAB[py]))[[1]]) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 11) +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom", panel.grid.minor = element_blank())
}

# --- PART B: full lower-triangle correlation corner for ONE algorithm,
#             with ellipses (emp/Fisher/corrected) AND markers (truth/emp/pred) ---
corner_plot <- function(algo, title = NULL) {
  xlev <- ORD[1:3]; ylev <- ORD[2:4]
  prs <- expand.grid(xp = ORD, yp = ORD, stringsAsFactors = FALSE) %>%
    filter(match(yp, ORD) > match(xp, ORD))
  cl  <- pts %>% filter(algorithm == .env$algo)          # .env: arg wins over `algo` column
  dib <- dib_vector(algo)

  cloud_l <- map_dfr(seq_len(nrow(prs)), function(k) {
    xp <- prs$xp[k]; yp <- prs$yp[k]
    cl %>% transmute(xp = xp, yp = yp, x = .data[[xp]], y = .data[[yp]])
  }) %>% filter(is.finite(x), is.finite(y))

  ell_l <- map_dfr(seq_len(nrow(prs)), function(k) {
    xp <- prs$xp[k]; yp <- prs$yp[k]
    c2 <- cl %>% transmute(x = .data[[xp]], y = .data[[yp]]) %>% filter(is.finite(x), is.finite(y))
    if (nrow(c2) < 3) return(NULL)
    ctr <- c(mean(c2$x), mean(c2$y))
    Ss <- list(empirical = cov(cbind(c2$x, c2$y)),
               Fisher    = battery_cov_pair("Likelihood_Fisher_Covariance", algo, PARAM_IDX[xp], PARAM_IDX[yp]),
               corrected = battery_cov_pair("Likelihood_Distortion_Corrected_Covariance", algo, PARAM_IDX[xp], PARAM_IDX[yp]))
    map_dfr(names(Ss), function(nm) {
      e <- ellipse_path(ctr[1], ctr[2], Ss[[nm]]); if (is.null(e)) return(NULL)
      e %>% mutate(xp = xp, yp = yp, source = nm)
    })
  })

  cen_l <- map_dfr(seq_len(nrow(prs)), function(k) {
    xpk <- prs$xp[k]; ypk <- prs$yp[k]
    c2 <- cl %>% transmute(x = .data[[xpk]], y = .data[[ypk]]) %>% filter(is.finite(x), is.finite(y))
    # precompute scalars OUTSIDE tibble() so its data-masking cannot reinterpret xp/yp as the
    # just-created columns (the bug that inflated column sizes)
    tx <- unname(TRUTH[xpk]); ty <- unname(TRUTH[ypk])
    bx <- unname(dib[xpk]);   by <- unname(dib[ypk])
    mx <- if (nrow(c2)) mean(c2$x) else NA_real_
    my <- if (nrow(c2)) mean(c2$y) else NA_real_
    tibble(xp = xpk, yp = ypk,
           x = c(tx, mx, tx + bx),
           y = c(ty, my, ty + by),
           kind = c("truth", "empirical mean", "predicted (truth + bias)"))
  })

  fx <- function(z) factor(z, levels = xlev, labels = unname(PARAM_LAB[xlev]))
  fy <- function(z) factor(z, levels = ylev, labels = unname(PARAM_LAB[ylev]))
  cloud_l <- mutate(cloud_l, xp = fx(xp), yp = fy(yp))
  ell_l   <- mutate(ell_l,   xp = fx(xp), yp = fy(yp),
                    source = factor(source, levels = c("empirical","Fisher","corrected")))
  cen_l   <- mutate(cen_l,   xp = fx(xp), yp = fy(yp),
                    kind = factor(kind, levels = c("truth","empirical mean","predicted (truth + bias)")))

  # symmetric per-panel limits so the expected value sits at the CENTRE of each cell; the extra
  # half-width (1.25) also leaves clean room for the area-ratio labels in the top-left corner.
  lims_l <- map_dfr(seq_len(nrow(prs)), function(k) {
    xpk <- prs$xp[k]; ypk <- prs$yp[k]
    c2 <- cl %>% transmute(x = .data[[xpk]], y = .data[[ypk]]) %>% filter(is.finite(x), is.finite(y))
    tx <- unname(TRUTH[xpk]); ty <- unname(TRUTH[ypk])
    hx <- 1.25 * max(abs(quantile(c2$x, c(.01, .99), na.rm = TRUE) - tx))
    hy <- 1.25 * max(abs(quantile(c2$y, c(.01, .99), na.rm = TRUE) - ty))
    tibble(xp = xpk, yp = ypk, x = c(tx - hx, tx + hx), y = c(ty - hy, ty + hy))
  }) %>% mutate(xp = fx(xp), yp = fy(yp))
  # clip the cloud to the symmetric [truth +/- h] panel so the TRUTH stays CENTRED in every cell
  # (outlier points would otherwise drag the free-scale range off-centre and un-round the ticks).
  .bnd <- lims_l %>% group_by(xp, yp) %>%
    summarise(x0 = min(x), x1 = max(x), y0 = min(y), y1 = max(y), .groups = "drop")
  cloud_l <- cloud_l %>% inner_join(.bnd, by = c("xp", "yp")) %>%
    filter(x >= x0, x <= x1, y >= y0, y <= y1) %>% select(-x0, -x1, -y0, -y1)

  # area-ratio labels per corner cell (same convention as Part A): orange = empirical/Fisher,
  # blue = empirical/corrected. For IR they are ~1x everywhere, the quantitative face of "IR calibrates".
  labs_l <- map_dfr(seq_len(nrow(prs)), function(k) {
    xpk <- prs$xp[k]; ypk <- prs$yp[k]
    c2 <- cl %>% transmute(x = .data[[xpk]], y = .data[[ypk]]) %>% filter(is.finite(x), is.finite(y))
    if (nrow(c2) < 3) return(NULL)
    tx <- unname(TRUTH[xpk]); ty <- unname(TRUTH[ypk])
    hx <- 1.25 * max(abs(quantile(c2$x, c(.01, .99), na.rm = TRUE) - tx)); hy <- 1.25 * max(abs(quantile(c2$y, c(.01, .99), na.rm = TRUE) - ty))
    Aemp <- .area(cov(cbind(c2$x, c2$y)))
    # place the labels in the TOP corner OFF the cloud's tilt: positive correlation -> the cloud
    # runs bottom-left..top-right, so top-left is empty (hj=0); negative -> top-right is empty (hj=1).
    rho <- suppressWarnings(cor(c2$x, c2$y))
    hj  <- if (is.finite(rho) && rho < 0) 1 else 0
    tibble(xp = xpk, yp = ypk, hj = hj,
           lab_F = .fmt(Aemp / .area(battery_cov_pair("Likelihood_Fisher_Covariance", algo, PARAM_IDX[xpk], PARAM_IDX[ypk]))),
           lab_C = .fmt(Aemp / .area(battery_cov_pair("Likelihood_Distortion_Corrected_Covariance", algo, PARAM_IDX[xpk], PARAM_IDX[ypk]))),
           x = tx + ifelse(hj == 1, hx, -hx) * 0.92, yF = ty + hy * 0.92, yC = ty + hy * 0.60)
  }) %>% mutate(xp = fx(xp), yp = fy(yp))

  ggplot() +
    geom_blank(data = lims_l, aes(x, y)) +
    geom_point(data = cloud_l, aes(x, y), colour = "grey55", size = .3, alpha = .15) +
    geom_path(data = ell_l, aes(x, y, colour = source, linetype = source, linewidth = source)) +
    geom_point(data = cen_l, aes(x, y, shape = kind), size = 2, stroke = .8,
               colour = "black", inherit.aes = FALSE) +
    geom_text(data = labs_l, aes(x, yF, label = lab_F, hjust = hj), colour = "#D55E00", size = 2.8, vjust = 1) +
    geom_text(data = labs_l, aes(x, yC, label = lab_C, hjust = hj), colour = "#0072B2", size = 2.8, vjust = 1) +
    facet_grid(yp ~ xp, scales = "free", drop = FALSE, labeller = label_parsed) +
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = sym_breaks_fn) + scale_y_continuous(breaks = sym_breaks_fn) +
    scale_colour_manual(values = c(empirical = "grey45", Fisher = "#D55E00",
                                   corrected = "#0072B2"), name = NULL) +
    scale_linetype_manual(values = c(empirical = "solid", Fisher = "dashed",
                                     corrected = "dotted"), name = NULL) +
    scale_linewidth_manual(values = c(empirical = .5, Fisher = .65, corrected = .95), guide = "none") +
    scale_shape_manual(values = c("truth" = 3, "empirical mean" = 19,
                                  "predicted (truth + bias)" = 1), name = NULL) +
    labs(x = NULL, y = NULL, title = title) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 10) +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom", panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
          strip.text = element_text(size = 9),
          plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 11, face = "bold"))
}
```

```{r plot, fig.width = 7.0, fig.height = 9.5}
rowA1 <- pair_plot("on", "off") + labs(tag = "A")
# same 5 algorithms as row 1 (columns aligned) -> drop the repeated strip headers on row 2
rowA2 <- pair_plot("Num_ch_mean", "unitary_current") +
  theme(strip.text = element_blank(), strip.background = element_blank())
# strip the corner's legend so guides="collect" keeps ONE copy (Part A's); otherwise the
# slightly different glyph sizes (linewidth .7 vs .6) make collect emit two duplicate legends.
corner <- corner_plot("macro_IR", title = "IR") + labs(tag = "B") +
  guides(colour = "none", linetype = "none", shape = "none")

# No figure title/subtitle: per eLife author guidance the title and full legend live in
# the manuscript text, not baked into the image. Only panel lettering (A, B) stays.
# Sized to eLife full page width (~19 cm). Part A: two pair-rows; Part B: IR corner.
g2 <- (rowA1 / rowA2 / corner) +
  plot_layout(heights = c(1, 1, 2.6), guides = "collect") &
  theme(legend.position = "bottom", legend.box = "horizontal",
        legend.margin = margin(0, 0, 0, 0), legend.spacing.x = unit(5, "pt"),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 8.5), legend.key.size = unit(10, "pt"))
g2
ggsave("Figure_2.pdf", g2, width = 7.0, height = 9.5)
```

```{r diagnostics-table}
area <- function(S) if (is.null(S) || any(!is.finite(S))) NA else
  { ev <- eigen(S, symmetric = TRUE)$values; if (any(ev <= 0)) NA else sqrt(prod(ev)) }

# Part A pairs: Fisher/empirical ratio per algorithm (overconfidence > 1 means Fisher too tight)
diag_pair <- function(px, py) {
  pix <- PARAM_IDX[px]; piy <- PARAM_IDX[py]
  map_dfr(ALGOS, function(a) {
    cl <- pts %>% filter(algorithm == a) %>%
      transmute(x = .data[[px]], y = .data[[py]]) %>% filter(is.finite(x), is.finite(y))
    Semp <- if (nrow(cl) > 2) cov(cbind(cl$x, cl$y)) else NULL
    tibble(pair = paste(px, py, sep = "/"), algorithm = ALGO_LAB[a],
           empirical = area(Semp),
           Fisher    = area(battery_cov_pair("Likelihood_Fisher_Covariance", a, pix, piy)),
           corrected = area(battery_cov_pair("Likelihood_Distortion_Corrected_Covariance", a, pix, piy))) %>%
      mutate(emp_over_Fisher = empirical / Fisher)
  })
}
bind_rows(diag_pair("on", "off"), diag_pair("Num_ch_mean", "unitary_current"))

# IR unbiasedness check: empirical mean - truth per param (should be ~0)
pts %>% filter(algorithm == "macro_IR") %>%
  summarise(across(all_of(ORD), ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE))) %>%
  pivot_longer(everything(), names_to = "param", values_to = "emp_mean") %>%
  mutate(truth = unname(TRUTH[param]), bias = emp_mean - truth)
```
